summary: Milestones Tab | Hearing Announcement When Navigating Between Innings in Milestones
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Inning Navigation section
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action:
WHEN the user presses the right arrow key to move to the next inning
OR
WHEN the user presses the left arrow key to move to the next inning
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “Viewing <insert inning displayed> inning, press left arrow key to view milestones in the previous inning, press right arrow key to view milestones in the next inning”
